notes: Anonymous dim block: DIM lines, DIMDOT ticks, MTEXT 5795, DEFPOINTS.

rationale.evidence: Name *D315 plus layer mix DIM/DEFPOINTS, DIMDOT inserts, and MTEXT '\A1;5795' match an exploded/cached dimension. The three LINEs are parallel extension/dimension geometry on DIM, not wall outlines.
rationale.rule: Blocks named *D### with only DIM/DEFPOINTS content, dim ticks, and numeric MTEXT are dimension caches, not plan geometry.
rationale.counterfactual: WALL/A-WALL polylines or door/window symbology without DIM ticks would flip away from 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot see the parent DIMENSION entity or measured feature; only this anonymous definition projection is available.

notes: Dim cache: three DIM lines, DIMDOTs, MTEXT 1420, DEFPOINTS.

rationale.evidence: *D316 contains only DIM-layer LINEs, two DIMDOT INSERTs, numeric MTEXT 1420, and DEFPOINTS POINTs—classic anonymous dimension exploded content.
rationale.rule: Treat *D* definitions whose entities are exclusively dimension graphics and DEFPOINTS as 치수캐시.
rationale.counterfactual: If LINEs lived on a construction wall layer with thickness pairs and no dim text/ticks, wall_likelihood would rise.
rationale.uncertainty: Orientation relative to the plan and what is being measured cannot be confirmed from this projection alone.

notes: Large vertical dim cache with MTEXT 10400 and DIMDOT markers.

rationale.evidence: Entity set is DIM lines + DIMDOT + MTEXT 10400 + DEFPOINTS; bbox is a long thin measurement span, not a room/wall assembly.
rationale.rule: Numeric MTEXT on DIM with tick inserts and DEFPOINTS points indicates dimension cache regardless of span length.
rationale.counterfactual: Presence of hatch, wall centerlines, or furniture blocks would challenge the 치수캐시 label.
rationale.uncertainty: Whether 10400 is mm or another unit, and which plan edge it annotates, is unknown here.

notes: Short dim segment cache: MTEXT 800, DIMDOT, DIM/DEFPOINTS only.

rationale.evidence: Same pattern as other *D blocks: three DIM LINEs, DIMDOT inserts, MTEXT 800, three DEFPOINTS—no architectural layers.
rationale.rule: Absence of non-DIM geometry plus dimension tick blocks forces role=치수캐시 and wall_likelihood near zero.
rationale.counterfactual: Replacing DIMDOT/MTEXT with continuous double-line wall outlines on A-WALL would flip the judgment.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot tell if this is an overall or partial dimension without the host drawing context.

notes: Very short dim cache MTEXT 375 with DIMDOT and DEFPOINTS.

rationale.evidence: Compact bbox and entities limited to DIM LINEs, DIMDOT, MTEXT 375, DEFPOINTS match a small dimension cache, not walls.
rationale.rule: Short measured spans with dim graphics remain 치수캐시; wall lines require non-DIM layer structure.
rationale.counterfactual: If the projection included closed wall polylines or openings, role could shift to 평면 부분도.
rationale.uncertainty: What feature is 375 units long cannot be inferred from the anonymous block alone.

notes: Dim cache with _ArchTick ends, five DIM lines, MTEXT 185.

rationale.evidence: Five DIM LINEs form extension/dimension stubs with _ArchTick inserts and MTEXT 185 plus DEFPOINTS—architectural tick style dimension cache.
rationale.rule: _ArchTick or DIMDOT on DIM with numeric MTEXT and DEFPOINTS classifies the block as 치수캐시.
rationale.counterfactual: Removing ticks/MTEXT and adding parallel wall core/finish lines on WALL layers would raise wall_likelihood.
rationale.uncertainty: Tick style implies architectural dims but not which building element is measured.

notes: Vertical dim cache MTEXT 2400 with _ArchTick markers.

rationale.evidence: Three DIM LINEs spanning ~2400, _ArchTick INSERTs, MTEXT 2400, DEFPOINTS—standard anonymous dimension definition.
rationale.rule: Anonymous *D blocks that are only dimension graphics are never walls or furniture.
rationale.counterfactual: Furniture INSERT names or seat/table geometry would move role toward 가구.
rationale.uncertainty: Link to the live DIMENSION object and override values is not visible in this projection.

notes: Tight dim cache MTEXT 80 with _ArchTick and stub LINEs.

rationale.evidence: Eleven entities all on DIM/DEFPOINTS: stub extension LINEs, _ArchTick, MTEXT 80—dimension cache for a small gap.
rationale.rule: Even multi-LINE dim assemblies stay 치수캐시 when layers and ticks are dim-only.
rationale.counterfactual: If LINEs were on WALL and formed a closed corridor outline without dim text, judgment would flip.
rationale.uncertainty: Whether 80 is clearance, thickness, or another attribute cannot be known from entities alone.

notes: Dim cache MTEXT 80, _ArchTick, three DIM lines, DEFPOINTS.

rationale.evidence: Identical dim-cache signature: DIM LINEs, _ArchTick, numeric MTEXT 80, DEFPOINTS POINTs; no plan layers.
rationale.rule: Role is driven by entity/layer/tick pattern, not by measured value size.
rationale.counterfactual: Symbol block inserts (e.g. electrical) without dim ticks would suggest 심볼 instead.
rationale.uncertainty: Spatial relation to adjacent *D322/*D324 dims is outside this single definition.

notes: Dim cache MTEXT 2200 with _ArchTick on DIM/DEFPOINTS.

rationale.evidence: Long vertical DIM dimension line set with _ArchTick and MTEXT 2200 plus DEFPOINTS matches anonymous dimension cache.
rationale.rule: DIM-layer measurement graphics with tick blocks and DEFPOINTS => 치수캐시; wall_line_handles empty.
rationale.counterfactual: Adding A-WALL double lines coincident with the measured span would still keep this block as dim cache, but a separate wall block would be needed for walls.
rationale.uncertainty: Host view scale and dimension style name are not in the projection.

notes: Small dim cache MTEXT 70 with _ArchTick and five DIM lines.

rationale.evidence: Stub LINEs around a 70-unit span, _ArchTick inserts, MTEXT 70, DEFPOINTS—pure dimension exploded content.
rationale.rule: Count of LINEs (3 vs 5) does not change classification when all content remains dim ticks and DIM/DEFPOINTS.
rationale.counterfactual: Non-numeric MTEXT labels or title text without ticks could suggest annotation other than dim cache.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot verify association to a specific wall thickness or opening from this block alone.

notes: Horizontal dim cache MTEXT 1820 with DIMDOT ticks.

rationale.evidence: Two vertical extension LINEs and one horizontal dim LINE on DIM, DIMDOT inserts, MTEXT 1820, DEFPOINTS—horizontal dimension cache.
rationale.rule: Orthogonal extension+dimension LINE triples with dim ticks and numeric MTEXT are 치수캐시, not wall outlines.
rationale.counterfactual: If the three LINEs formed a continuous wall path on a wall layer without MTEXT/ticks, wall_likelihood would increase.
rationale.uncertainty: Plan north and which bay/room width is annotated remain unknown.

notes: Horizontal dim cache MTEXT 2715, DIMDOT, DEFPOINTS.

rationale.evidence: Same horizontal dim pattern as *D326: DIM extension/dim LINEs, DIMDOT, MTEXT 2715, DEFPOINTS only.
rationale.rule: Anonymous *D### + DIM/DEFPOINTS + dim tick + numeric MTEXT => role 치수캐시, wall_likelihood 0.
rationale.counterfactual: Furniture geometry (chair, desk outlines) would flip role to 가구.
rationale.uncertainty: Continuity with neighboring horizontal dims is not encoded in this isolated definition.

notes: Wide horizontal dim cache MTEXT 6530 with DIMDOT.

rationale.evidence: Wide bbox (~6530) but content is still DIM LINEs, DIMDOT, MTEXT 6530, DEFPOINTS—long overall dimension cache, not walls.
rationale.rule: Span length alone never implies walls; layer and dim-tick evidence dominate.
rationale.counterfactual: Closed multi-segment wall polylines spanning the same bbox on WALL would indicate 평면 부분도.
rationale.uncertainty: Whether this is a building overall width or a chain segment needs the parent dim chain.

notes: Horizontal dim cache MTEXT 1980, DIMDOT, DIM/DEFPOINTS.

rationale.evidence: Standard horizontal dimension exploded set: extension LINEs, dim LINE, DIMDOT, MTEXT 1980, DEFPOINTS.
rationale.rule: Classify as 치수캐시 whenever the projection is dim graphics only under *D names.
rationale.counterfactual: Absence of MTEXT and ticks plus presence of door swing arcs would suggest plan detail instead.
rationale.uncertainty: Measured object identity (room, grid, opening) cannot be read from handles alone.

notes: Horizontal dim cache MTEXT 1840 with DIMDOT markers.

rationale.evidence: DIM-layer LINEs, DIMDOT INSERTs, MTEXT 1840, DEFPOINTS POINTs with no non-dim content.
rationale.rule: Dim tick block names (DIMDOT/_ArchTick) plus DEFPOINTS are strong negative evidence for walls.
rationale.counterfactual: Wall_likelihood would rise only if substantial non-DIM linework representing thickness appeared.
rationale.uncertainty: Drawing units and dim style overrides are not present in the projection.

notes: Overall horizontal dim cache MTEXT 15100 spanning full width.

rationale.evidence: Very wide horizontal dim: DIM extension LINEs at ends, dim LINE, DIMDOT, MTEXT 15100, DEFPOINTS—overall dimension cache.
rationale.rule: Overall dimensions are still 치수캐시; large bbox does not imply plan partial drawing.
rationale.counterfactual: If the block contained grid bubbles, room tags, and wall outlines, role would become 평면 부분도.
rationale.uncertainty: Whether 15100 sums prior segments (*D326–*D330) cannot be verified here.

notes: Vertical-ish dim cache MTEXT 240 with _ArchTick stubs.

rationale.evidence: Five DIM LINEs with short stubs, _ArchTick inserts, MTEXT 240, DEFPOINTS—dimension cache, not wall core.
rationale.rule: Stub extension segments on DIM with architectural ticks remain dimension graphics.
rationale.counterfactual: Parallel offset pairs on WALL forming a thickness would be candidate wall lines.
rationale.uncertainty: Exact measurement axis relative to the building shell is not shown beyond LINE coordinates.

notes: Dim cache MTEXT 1500 with _ArchTick on DIM/DEFPOINTS.

rationale.evidence: Three DIM LINEs, _ArchTick pair, MTEXT 1500, DEFPOINTS—anonymous dimension definition pattern.
rationale.rule: Keep wall_line_handles empty when every LINE is on DIM and accompanied by dim ticks/text.
rationale.counterfactual: Symbol-only content (no numeric dim text) would push toward 심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: Parent dimension associativity and override state are invisible in this shard.

notes: Narrow dim cache MTEXT 80 with _ArchTick and five DIM lines.

rationale.evidence: Compact five-LINE DIM assembly, _ArchTick inserts, MTEXT 80, DEFPOINTS—matches adjacent small-gap dimension caches.
rationale.rule: DIM/DEFPOINTS-only *D blocks with tick inserts and numeric MTEXT are always 치수캐시 with wall_likelihood 0.
rationale.counterfactual: Replacing this content with door/window block geometry would change role to 심볼 or 평면 부분도.
rationale.uncertainty: Which clearance or thickness 80 represents requires the host plan entities not present here.
